headline: Costco Gold Bars Spark Viral Buzz And Raise Valuation Questions
summary: Costco Wholesale (NasdaqGS:COST) has drawn viral attention by selling one ounce gold bars through its membership warehouse clubs and online channels. The gold bars have attracted strong consumer interest, with reported rapid sellouts and waitlists as members seek access to physical gold at warehouse pricing. This new offering has contributed to revenue and brand visibility beyond Costco's traditional mix of bulk groceries, general merchandise, and services. For a retailer best known for...
